Engineer.title: Engineer
Engineer.description: {pawn_name} didn't particularly want to be an engineer, though an opportunity was presented to earn a good living so the opportunity was taken.

Doctor.title: Doctor
Doctor.description: {pawn_name} spent several years at medical school then served on a colony ship for a while. Now they are drifting offering {pawn_possessive} services to those in need.

Marine.title: Marine
Marine.description: {pawn_name} knew from a young age {pawn_pronoun} wanted to serve in the military. Getting to see parts of the universe others didn't was probably one of the biggest draws.

Labourer.title: Labourer
Labourer.description: Growing up on a poor rim planet is tough and education is scarce. {pawn_name} was one of the lucky ones and managed to find a career as a labourer. It's not a glamorous life but at least it is a life.

Pilot.title: Pilot
Pilot.description: Joining pilot school is all {pawn_name} wanted to do. Who knew {pawn_pronoun} might actually be pretty good at it.

Miner.title: Miner
Miner.description: Deep space mining is extremely dangerous and {pawn_name} has had {pawn_possessive} fair share of danger in the past.

AnimalHandler.title: Animal handler
AnimalHandler.description: {pawn_name} grew up on a colony ship which had an over abundance of animals. Whilst others would rather try and kill them as pests. {pawn_name} would rescue them and tend to them if they were ill or injured. Sometimes even teaching them skills or tricks.

Scientist.title: Scientist
Scientist.description: Scientists are needed now more than ever. {pawn_name} leveraged this need and managed to turn it into a very profitable career.

Grower.title: Grower
Grower.description: Spending lots of time with plants and all things organic has been {pawn_name}'s passion since a very young age.

Retired.title: Retired
Retired.description: {pawn_name} has won the life lottery and managed to grow old, {pawn_pronoun} is now living a well deserved dose of retirement.

Student.title: Student
Student.description: {pawn_name} is still studying in the hopes to try and better {pawn_reflexive}, though no one really knows what for, and probably neither does {pawn_pronoun}.

Professor.title: Professor
Professor.description: Spending lots of time in education and excelling {pawn_reflexive} has earned {pawn_name} the title of Professor.

Merchant.title: Merchant
Merchant.description: {pawn_name} has grown up from a long line of traders and decided to continue in the footsteps of {pawn_possessive} forefathers.

Pirate.title: Pirate
Pirate.description: {pawn_name} lives the life of a Pirate, salvaging anything {pawn_pronoun} can, earning whatever, wherever {pawn_pronoun} can.

Slave.title: Slave
Slave.description: {pawn_name} has lived a life of poverty, being sold to the highest bidder and being asked to do all manner of things. There is no telling what {pawn_pronoun} has had to endure.

Slaver.title: Slaver
Slaver.description: {pawn_name} usually travels the universe in search of poor folk to enslave and sell, or just those unlucky enough to be in the wrong place at the wrong time.

BountyHunter.title: Bounty Hunter
BountyHunter.description: {pawn_name} lives the life of an assassin and will hunt anything or anyone for the right price. It's not a job for everyone but it pays pretty well.

OffworldDetective.title: Offworld Detective
OffworldDetective.description: As as orphan {pawn_name} was raised on colony ships. Trying to survive as a youngster meant getting into a lot of trouble. It is this that made {pawn_reflexive_short} decide 'being the boot was better than receiving the boot'.

PlanetDrifter.title: Planet Drifter
PlanetDrifter.description: A Planet Drifter is less of a job and more of a way of life. {pawn_name} drifts from planet to planet picking up whatever work {pawn_pronoun} can. Sometimes {pawn_pronoun} will board a ship not even knowing where it's journey ends.

Spacefarer.title: Spacefarer
Spacefarer.description: {pawn_name} travels around the universe. Although this is more of a hobby than a job, {pawn_name} would probably make you believe different.

Planetologist.title: Planetologist
Planetologist.description: {pawn_name} studies the ecosystems of planets. As a child {pawn_pronoun} would dream about all the different weird and wonderful rocks out there. Now {pawn_pronoun} gets to see them all first hand.

Consor.title: Consor
Consor.description: Being a Consor {pawn_name} has been trained from a young age in the art of partnership, that is the entertaining or looking after of others, intimately or psychologically. Most Consors also have some basic self defence training.

Prisoner.title: Prisoner
Prisoner.description: Locked up for a crime {pawn_pronoun} claims {pawn_pronoun} didn't commit, though that's what they all say.

Chef.title: Chef
Chef.description: {pawn_name} has always had a passion to cook and experiment combining different flavours together, always striving to make that one perfect dish.
